overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running along a dirt trail through a lush forest environment. The character passes a small animal and approaches a glowing blue holographic datapoint embedded in a rock formation.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with river and rock formations

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the dirt trail through the forested area, navigating between large rocks and vegetation

entered.detail: massive reddish boulder formation lining the left side of the trail
winding dirt trail with scattered stones and footprints
flowing waterway running parallel to the trail on the left side
dense forest of tall trees creating a dark green backdrop
bushes with distinctive red and pink foliage lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a winding dirt trail through a lush forest environment. Large rock formations line the left side while a river flows parallel to the path. The trail is surrounded by dense vegetation including tall trees and distinctive red flowering bushes.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail section near river

events.description: small fox-like animal runs across the path from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the trail as a small animal crosses the path ahead

notable_agents.action: small dark-furred animal darts across the dirt path from right to left

segments.scene_description: The character continues running along the forest trail. A small animal suddenly darts across the path from right to left in front of the character. The large rock formations from the previous section fall behind while the river becomes more prominent on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky outcrop with ancient holographic technology

events.description: glowing blue holographic datapoint becomes visible embedded in the rock formation ahead
character reaches the holographic datapoint and slows to interact with the glowing interface

agents.ego_description: running toward the glowing holographic object and slowing down to approach the ancient technology

entered.detail: glowing blue holographic interface with circular patterns and floating text embedded in rock
large moss-covered boulder formation featuring ancient technological interfaces

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large rock outcropping featuring a glowing blue holographic datapoint. The holographic interface becomes increasingly prominent as the character nears it, revealing intricate technological patterns floating above the stone surface. The character slows to interact with the ancient device.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush forest trail that culminates in the discovery of an ancient technological relic. It begins with the character running along a winding dirt path flanked by large rock formations and a parallel river, surrounded by dense vegetation and red flowering bushes. As the character continues forward, the large rocks recede and the river becomes more prominent while a small animal suddenly darts across the path. The scene then shifts toward a large rock outcropping where a glowing blue holographic datapoint emerges from the stone. Finally, the camera closes in on the intricate technological patterns of the interface as the character slows to interact with the device.
